overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city. The player character walks from a sidewalk alongside modern buildings, crosses an intersection at Pacific Blvd, and continues down a wide avenue toward towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.

events.description: camera pans down from looking up at skyscraper to street level
begins walking forward along the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk next to a modern building with horizontal slats, looking up at the towering structure

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with grid-like windows towering overhead into the fog
tall palm tree silhouetted against the teal night sky
modern building with horizontal wooden or metal slats and warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a massive residential tower in a rainy cyberpunk city. The camera pans down to street level and begins walking along a wet sidewalk beside a modern building with horizontal slats, with palm trees visible against the hazy night sky.

events.description: street lights become more prominent as the intersection approaches

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a building marked '02' and illuminated street lamps

entered.detail: low-rise building with illuminated white '02' signage on the facade
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light onto the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rain-slicked sidewalk, the camera passes a building marked with '02' and tall street lamps. The horizontal slatted building remains on the right while the distant city skyline becomes visible ahead, shrouded in fog and neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with traffic signals and street signs

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing crossing
crossing from sidewalk onto the main avenue, leaving the building facade behind

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection at Pacific Blvd, navigating between traffic signals

entered.detail: red street sign indicating 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on traffic light pole
black directional sign with white text pointing toward 'Santo Domingo'
overhead metal structure spanning the road with multiple traffic lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection marked by street signs for Pacific Blvd and Santo Domingo. The camera crosses the wet asphalt as traffic lights change from red to green, passing under an overhead signal gantry while massive neon-lit skyscrapers loom in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane avenue leading to downtown skyscrapers

events.description: slight camera turn to center on the massive skyscraper with vertical neon ads ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the rain-soaked avenue toward towering neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: colossal skyscraper covered in vertical holographic advertisements and bright neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking down the wide, rain-soaked avenue, the camera moves toward a massive skyscraper covered in vertical neon advertisements. The street lights and traffic signals fade behind as the character progresses deeper into the downtown area, with the towering neon building dominating the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the base of a residential tower through a rain-soaked urban corridor that culminates in the heart of a neon-lit downtown district. It begins with a dramatic tilt down from a massive skyscraper to a wet sidewalk, moving past a modern slatted building and palm trees under a hazy night sky. As the camera progresses along the rain-slicked pavement past street lamps and building markers, the view expands to reveal a distant, fog-shrouded skyline. The scene then opens into a wide intersection at Pacific Blvd, where the camera crosses wet asphalt under a signal gantry as traffic lights shift from red to green. Finally, the movement carries the viewer down a broad avenue, leaving the intersection behind to approach a towering skyscraper dominated by massive vertical neon advertisements.
